summary:
Cyanide inhibits cytochrome c oxidase disrupting oxidative phosphorylation; this leads to indirect impairment of the citric acid cycle due to lack of necessary redox reactions. Key enzyme involved here is likely a component directly within or closely related to the TCA pathway like aconitase given its central position.
